description: Simulate the 'Rasd al-Qibla' solar alignment event to verify the phenomenon and determine the exact Qibla compass bearing. At the specific moment of May 28, 2024, at 09:18:00 UTC, document the Sun's position from two locations: Mecca, Saudi Arabia (21.42° N, 39.83° E) and London, United Kingdom (51.51° N, -0.13° W). Capture a screenshot of the Sun centered in the view for both locations, saved to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Write a report to /home/ga/Desktop/qibla_report.txt containing the event date and time, the Sun's altitude as observed from Mecca, and the Sun's azimuth as observed from London.
